description: Style NoteEmbrace the outdoors-come rain or shine with wildcraft's range of Active rainwear. Uniquely crafted to ensure comfort while braving the elements, this pair of trousers also has waterproof pockets with Velcro closures to keep your monetary essentials dry.Product detailsBlack full length rain trousers, two side pockets with Velcro closures, adjustable elasticated hemline, branding on left leg, wide elasticated waistbandMaterial and CareSyntheticMachine wash cold Do not ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model ( height5'8"and waist 34") is wearing a size MPlease note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shown
